meta.title: Uganda natural resources research (2024–2026)
meta.inclusion_criteria: Published 2024–2026; Uganda-focused minerals, mining, oil, or extractive environmental impacts; DOI or institutional repository URL required.

papers.title: Genesis and distribution of gold deposits in Nyakishenyi Village, Buhweju District, Southwestern Uganda
papers.notes: Structural/geochemical controls; orogenic gold in Buhweju — field-based 2026 thesis.

papers.authors: Abraham, M.R.; Mnason, T.; Emmanuel, K.
papers.title: Soil and water contamination from oil exploration activities in the Albertine Graben study sites; Western Uganda
Assessing the impacts of land use changes on tree occurrence and diversity (sand mining noted in Nalwenkomba Wetland Catchment, Kamuli)
papers.notes: Confirm volume/issue from publisher before thesis citation.

papers.title: Trace-element behaviour in sediments of Ugandan part of Lake Victoria
papers.notes: Included as baseline for 2024–2026 lacustrine work; still actively cited.

papers.title: Mineral Potential of Uganda: Status of Exploration and Development
Uganda Economic Update (gold exports, commodity receipts, Wagagai mine note)
papers.notes: Discusses gold re-exports vs domestic production; FY25 export surge.

papers.authors: Ministry of Finance, Planning and Economic Development, Uganda
papers.title: Budget Framework Paper FY 2023/24 — gold export receipts
papers.notes: Reports US$3,092.12M gold exports FY2023/24; net exports US$478.29M after raw gold imports.
